description: Expanded revision matrix — prioritized buckets for open conditions

revisions.required_action: Issue revised WP upturn detail at all smoke exhaust hatch curbs

revisions.condition: Hatch curb termination not coordinated with membrane
revisions.required_action: Detail hatch curb termination height and membrane counterflashing interface
Reissue HH5 WP drawings with corrected field conditions and verified extents
Reissue NW_HH WP drawings addressing lap seam and drain locations

revisions.condition: Dunnage to roof membrane interface unresolved
revisions.required_action: Issue flashing detail for dunnage base plates penetrating or bearing on membrane

revisions.condition: Drain gutter and edge detail at canopy incomplete
revisions.required_action: Finalize canopy edge drain and gutter sizing, slope, and overflow locations
Coordinate delegated design package for dunnage with structural drawings

revisions.condition: Cladding to gutter drainage transition undetailed
revisions.required_action: Issue cladding-to-gutter transition detail confirming drainage continuity

revisions.condition: Portal frame to preclear wall coordination gap
revisions.required_action: Align portal header drawing with preclear wall layout and clearances

revisions.condition: TSA portal region wall type coordination pending
revisions.required_action: Confirm wall types and finish schedule at TSA portal approach zones

revisions.condition: Delegated design packages not yet issued
revisions.required_action: Await delegated engineer submission for dunnage and MEP hanger systems

revisions.condition: Mixed-system stack resolution at stair shaft
revisions.required_action: Resolve overlap of structural stair, WP upturn, and MEP penetrations before detailing
